case_title: MOHAMMED ALSHAER VS. GOL CAR SERVICES, LLC

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ALSHAER, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT GOL CAR SERVICES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALSHAER, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT GOL CAR SERVICES, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 09/20/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO THE ON 11/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-09-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED ALSHAER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOL CAR SERVICES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
